# Run QA quality gates in parallel

The QA workflow has no shared setup job. Formatting, lint, type-check, unit tests with SonarCloud, and Chromatic are independent jobs that start together and invoke the dependency setup they need; PR labelling remains independent. Formatting does not require package builds. Lint, type-check, and unit tests build internal packages before checking their consumers, and the unit-test job also prepares the Breeze UI browser dependency. A lockfile cache miss may cause concurrent installs on that uncommon run, but normal pull requests do not serialize quality gates behind a shared preparation job.
